title: Lithocarpus hypoglaucus
intro: Lithocarpus hypoglaucus, also known as the Himalayan evergreen oak, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Fagaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Lithocarpus hypoglaucus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Lithocarpus hypoglaucus is commonly used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions, often in combination with other herbs, to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
